title: Project 17 The Movie
overview: This film is the first fairly long film from Green Project Production which in 2016 was still called Project 17. This film was never finished. This film tells the story of Leandy's life who is fighting for Aisah's love while helping Dimas and Ical in the diamond buying and selling business. It turns out, it's all just a trap from the greedy mafia Boss Yayan and Koh Febri. Will Leandy, Dimas, and Ical be able to fight them in the end?
